subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-02 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The protection of the Cause of God and the unity of the people of Baha are dependent on firmness in the Covenant of God and adherence
subcodes.first_line_orig: حفظ امر اللّٰه و وحدت اهل بها منوط بثبوت بر عهد اللّٰه است و آثار قلم میثاق مبیّن آیات
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @chastisement and requital, @firmness in the Covenant
